MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiffs and Defendants. Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Arbitrator and Plaintiff's Motion for Sanctions are heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered both Motions Denied. Court ordered defendant's counsel to prepare an order. Proceedings reported by: La Von Granger. (212)
